markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Timmy to Abnormal's SEO content refresh workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Goal:** Drive click growth by refreshing existing SEO articles, targeting those ranked 5th or lower to capture the \#1 position.
  - [**Process:** Use Ahrefs to analyze keyword intent and top competitors, then add missing sections (e.g., a "What is..." definition) and improve skimability.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**Product Integration:** Weave Abnormal features naturally throughout the article as solutions to pain points, using the `Relevant Features` project for accurate messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Use Agentic Article Generation to create new sections, then manually stitch them into the existing article in a Google Doc, highlighting all changes in green.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

## Topics

### Goal: Drive Click Growth via SEO Refreshes

  - [**Objective:** Increase traffic by improving the SEO performance of existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - **Target:** Articles ranked 5th or lower, as these have the highest potential to reach the \#1 spot.
  - [**Scope:** All work is for SEO refreshes only.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Process: SEO-Driven Content Enhancement

  - [**1. Keyword Analysis (Ahrefs):**](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Check the article's URL in Ahrefs Organic Research to confirm its current ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Use the Ahrefs plugin on Google SERPs to analyze the AI Overview and top competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [**2. Content Enhancement:**](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
      - [**Add Missing Sections:** Use the AI Overview to identify and add critical sections, such as a "What is..." definition, to better match search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
      - [**Improve Skimability:** Enhance readability with bullet points, tables, and infographics.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
      - [**Add Infographics:** Include 1–2 infographics per article (e.g., for frameworks, benefits).](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
          - [**Process:** Write an image direction in the `Infographic Generation` project.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
          - [**Requirement:** Any data in an infographic must first be cited in the article's text.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

### Product Integration: Natural Feature Placement

  - [**Strategy:** Integrate Abnormal features naturally as solutions to pain points, avoiding a salesy tone.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [**Resource:** Use the `Relevant Features` project (in pod D) for accurate, approved messaging on each feature.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Inspiration:** Model the integration style on the successful Outreach account work, which effectively wove in platform modules.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [**Conclusion CTA:**](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [For mid-funnel articles → Link to other blog posts or a newsletter.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [For bottom-funnel articles → Use a "Book a Demo" CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

### Workflow: Agentic Generation & Manual Stitching

  - [**Tooling:** Use Agentic Article Generation to create new sections.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This method is more effective for generating specific content than the Agentic Refresher tool.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
    1.  [Copy the existing article into a Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
    2.  [Use Agentic Article Generation to create content for new sections.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
    3.  [Manually stitch the new sections into the Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
    4.  [Highlight all new content (additions, edits) in green for easy review.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [**Required Metadata:**](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Meta Title](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Meta Description](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Slug](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Alt Text (per image; placeholder "alt text" is acceptable)](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [Confirm 5 topics for Timmy on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [**Timmy:**](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [Begin work mid-next week, with a goal to deliver the first 5 refreshes by EOW Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/oXzhnd-RGhLDFbvaiY7CdYDDdycHr2xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
